VersionTwo.name: PASSIVE_VERSIONTWO_NAME
VersionTwo.desc_resolved:
Start with 1 Tech.
Your Tech can't drop below 1.

2.desc_resolved:
Start with 1 Tech.
Your Tech can't drop below 1.
Your Tech isn't removed when you craft.

WeaponProficiency.name: PASSIVE_WEAPONPROFICIENCY_NAME
WeaponProficiency.desc_resolved: Your weapon damage scales with your stats and counts as a basic attack.

2.desc_resolved:
Your weapon damage scales with your stats and counts as a basic attack.
You can use your weapon an extra time each turn.

LivingBattery.name: PASSIVE_LIVINGBATTERY_NAME
LivingBattery.desc_resolved: When an adjacent ally spends mana, gain that much mana.

2.desc_resolved: When an adjacent ally spends mana, gain that much mana. You have no mana cap.

FuzzyFeet.name: PASSIVE_FUZZYFEET_NAME
FuzzyFeet.desc_resolved: When you end your movement, deal 1 Electric Damage to all adjacent units for each tile you moved.

2.desc_resolved: When you end your movement, deal 1 Electric Damage to all adjacent units for each tile you moved. This damage has a chance to inflict Stun.

ArmorSpecialist.name: PASSIVE_ARMORSPECIALIST_NAME
ArmorSpecialist.desc_resolved: Your equipment passive effects are doubled.

2.desc_resolved: Your equipment passive and active effects are doubled.

EMP.name: PASSIVE_EMP_NAME
EMP.desc_resolved:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun.

2.desc_resolved:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun. Your explosions don't affect allies.

MrMega.name: PASSIVE_MRMEGA_NAME
MrMega.desc_resolved: Your explosions are larger and deal +1 damage.

2.desc_resolved:
Your explosions are larger and deal +2 damage.
You have explosion immunity.

EscapeSequence.name: PASSIVE_ESCAPESEQUENCE_NAME
EscapeSequence.desc_resolved: When you take damage, explode and get launched to a random tile. This explosion doesn't damage you.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, explode with a large blast radious and get launched to a random tile. This explosion doesn't damage you.

ItemProxy.name: PASSIVE_ITEMPROXY_NAME
ItemProxy.desc_resolved: You need one fewer piece of equipment to get set bonuses.

2.desc_resolved: You need two fewer pieces of equipment to get set bonuses.

LightningRod.name: PASSIVE_LIGHTNINGROD_NAME
LightningRod.desc_resolved:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 1. Gain 1 charge when you are hit with electric damage.

2.desc_resolved:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2. Gain 1 charge for each damage prevented when you are hit with electric damage.

ItsAlive.name: PASSIVE_ITSALIVE_NAME
ItsAlive.desc_resolved: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.

2.desc_resolved: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP, +8 [img:spd], and +2 Damage. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.

Energizer.name: PASSIVE_ENERGIZER_NAME
Energizer.desc_resolved: When you cast a spell, your weapon gets +1 Damage.

2.desc_resolved:
When you cast a spell, your weapon gets +1 Damage.
Every third spell you cast, repair 1 use to your weapon.

ReactiveArmor.name: PASSIVE_REACTIVEARMOR_NAME
ReactiveArmor.desc_resolved: When you take damage, craft a Tinkerer weapon or armor piece and equip it in an empty slot.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, craft a Tinkerer weapon or armor piece and equip it in an empty slot and gain +1 [img:shield].

Nanobots.name: PASSIVE_NANOBOTS_NAME
Nanobots.desc_resolved: Gain +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration every time you take damage from an attack or spell.

2.desc_resolved: Gain +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration every time you take damage from an attack or spell and +1 Diminishing Health Regeneration each time you take damage from any other source.

Scrapper.name: PASSIVE_SCRAPPER_NAME
Scrapper.desc_resolved:
Find an extra consumable item at the end of each battle.
When you use up a consumable or trinket, equip a new consumable from your inventory if you have any.

2.desc_resolved:
Find an extra item at the end of each battle.
When you use up a consumable or trinket, equip a new consumable from your inventory if you have any.

DemoMan.name: PASSIVE_DEMOMAN_NAME
DemoMan.desc_resolved: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less.

2.desc_resolved: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less. You can use your basic action an additional time on each of your turns.

DuctTape.name: PASSIVE_DUCTTAPE_NAME
DuctTape.desc_resolved: Items you craft stay with you between battles, but become cursed.

2.desc_resolved: Items you craft stay with you between battles.

ArmoredPlating.name: PASSIVE_ARMOREDPLATING_NAME
ArmoredPlating.desc_resolved: Robots you spawn gain the stats and [img:shield] of your equipped armor.

2.desc_resolved: Robots you spawn gain the stats, [img:shield] and passive effects of your equipped armor.

BoobyTrap.name: PASSIVE_BOOBYTRAP_NAME
BoobyTrap.desc_resolved: When an item you have equipped breaks, it explodes!

2.desc_resolved: When an item you have equipped breaks, it explodes with bonus damage!

RobotArms.name: PASSIVE_ROBOTARMS_NAME
RobotArms.desc_resolved: You can use your weapon an additional time each turn.

2.desc_resolved:
You can use your weapon and trinket an additional time each turn.
Whenever you equip a new item during battle it gains +1 use.

Conductor.name: PASSIVE_CONDUCTOR_NAME
Conductor.desc_resolved: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped.

2.desc_resolved: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped. You have +2 Mana Regeneration for each piece of metal armor.

Napalm.name: PASSIVE_NAPALM_NAME
Napalm.desc_resolved: Your explosions inflict Burn 1 and light tiles on fire.

2.desc_resolved: Your explosions inflict Burn 3 and light tiles on fire.

Ingenuity.name: PASSIVE_INGENUITY_NAME
Ingenuity.desc_resolved: Pickups give you +1 Tech in addition to their other effects.

2.desc_resolved:
Pickups give you +1 Tech in addition to their other effects.
10 extra pickups spawn at the start of each battle.

Shrapnel_Tinkerer.name: PASSIVE_SHRAPNEL_TINKERER_NAME
Shrapnel_Tinkerer.desc_resolved: When you break an item, gain +1 Thorns.

2.desc_resolved: When you break an item, gain +2 Thorns and +3 [img:shield].

Blacksmith.name: PASSIVE_BLACKSMITH_NAME
Blacksmith.desc_resolved: If you have a weapon, your basic attack becomes Hone.

2.desc_resolved: If you have a weapon, your basic attack becomes Hone+.
